description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in maroon from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the quilted leather effect fabric and plait embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 24cmWidth: 34cmDepth: 16cmMade of synthetic leather for durability, quilted with heart pattern for high-fashion styleHas two main zipped compartments, one with internal zipped pocket, one with organiser pocketsTwo short handles attached to the bag with plaited loops, alternate long strap providedMock zip on front flap, two pockets below flap fastened with magnet closureZipped pockets on back and flap pockets on sides with magnet closureMetal stud feet on baseRound metal zip pulls for style and ease of useCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
